title: Craft Power List 2020
excerpt: I am so honored to be featured on PaperCrafter Magazine’s Craft Power List 2020! The Craft Power List includes the biggest names in the crafting industry that you need to know in 2020. What a gift to be featured alongside…
body:
I am so honored to be featured on PaperCrafter Magazine’s Craft Power List 2020! The Craft Power List includes the biggest names in the crafting industry that you need to know in 2020.

What a gift to be featured alongside such talented crafters such as Heidi Swapp and Katie Rodgers of Paper Fashion!

Here’s a close up of my feature. If you happen to get a copy of it, let me know! Thanks for letting me share, friends!

Issue 144 of PaperCrafter Magazine is on sale now. Subscribe and check out the rest of the Craft Power List 2020!
